days.summary: ByteDance Seed officially launched Seed 2.0 and previewed Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview alongside a new Full-Duplex Speech LLM, signaling a broader push into multimodal and real-time voice AI. Meta also introduced Muse Spark, the first model from Meta Superintelligence Labs, now powering Meta AI with multimodal reasoning and tool use. Google Research added two academic-workflow agents for figure generation and peer review, while OpenAI published a Child Safety Blueprint that could shape enterprise and regulatory expectations for AI safeguards.
